note: Optional structural-density map for Anatomical Scan mode. density = 1 - fractional grey-matter loss (1.0 = healthy). Values are calibrated to published cross-sectional atrophy: medial-temporal loss reaches ~20-25% in impairment, temporal/parietal ~10-15%, cingulate ~5-8% — NOT exaggerated. Diffused over the surface with a Gaussian; unlisted regions default to 1.0. Delete this file for a plain greyscale scan, or supply a flat per-vertex array (length == mesh vertex count) for vertex-level data.
